title: Wolfspeed Powers Toyota's Electric Vehicle Platforms with Highly Reliable Silicon Carbide Components
text: Wolfspeed Inc. announced that its automotive MOSFETs will power onboard charger systems for Toyota's Battery Electric Vehicles. The company's silicon carbide components will be integrated into Toyota's EV platforms, reflecting the automaker's confidence in Wolfspeed's quality and reliability standards. CEO Robert Feurle stated that Toyota is known for its uncompromising approach to quality and reliability, and Wolfspeed is honored to be supporting their next wave of electrification. Silicon carbide technology offers significant advantages for EV auxiliary power systems. By enabling higher power density and improved efficiency, these components reduce charging times and minimize energy loss, ultimately extending driving range and lowering recharge costs for vehicle owners. Chief Business Officer Cengiz Balkas emphasized that this reinforces Wolfspeed's role in driving electrification with silicon carbide technology that delivers performance, efficiency and safety. The partnership demonstrates Wolfspeed's established position within the automotive industry, with the company supporting multiple EV platforms through original equipment manufacturers and Tier 1 partners. The collaboration underscores silicon carbide's growing adoption as the industry standard for high-voltage automotive power systems.
